Designed to offer all Azure services (Rings 0-2). Always support Availability Zones. Often lower prices than other regions in the geography. Always have a paired region
Designed to offer all Ring 0 and Ring 1 services. Always have a paired region
Contains Ring 0 services. Typically smaller and higher priced than Hub or Hero regions
Smaller regions with 3 AZs. Typically the only region in a specific geography (e.g. UAE North) serving very specific or niche purposes
